name: Player Digging
desc: Player starts/cancels/ends mining a block, or drops an item (press Q).

fields.name: facing
fields.desc: Face of the block being mined

fields.name: status
fields.desc: START_DESTROY_BLOCK, ABORT_DESTROY_BLOCK, STOP_DESTROY_BLOCK, DROP_ALL_ITEMS, DROP_ITEM, RELEASE_USE_ITEM

notes: RELEASE_USE_ITEM (5) is used when the player stops eating/drinking/using a bow.

modules.name: Nuker
modules.purpose: START/STOP_DESTROY_BLOCK for nuker/speedmine. RELEASE_USE_ITEM for autoblock (releases right-click after attack). DROP_ITEM for inventory management or NoSlow bypass.

modules.name: Fucker
modules.purpose: START/STOP_DESTROY_BLOCK for nuker/speedmine. RELEASE_USE_ITEM for autoblock (releases right-click after attack). DROP_ITEM for inventory management or NoSlow bypass.
